dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal parameters SMA1_period and SMA2_period were not specified in original source. Based on Figure 4-1 context (EUR/USD with two SMAs) and standard practice, mapped to sma_5 (fast) and sma_20 (slow). Original rule allows bidirectional trading: long on crosses_above, short on crosses_below, with reversal exits. Target regimes set to TRENDING variants as indicated.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal parameters SMA1_period and SMA2_period were not specified in original source. Based on Figure 4-1 context (EUR/USD with two SMAs) and standard practice, mapped to sma_5 (fast) and sma_20 (slow). Original rule allows bidirectional trading: long on crosses_above, short on crosses_below, with reversal exits. Target regimes set to TRENDING variants as indicated.

source_rule_text: A trader should take a long position when a faster-moving average crosses above a slower-moving average, and take a short position when it crosses below.
